TAPTABLE.SettingModeHint: auto: enable the phone UI only when a phone-sized touch device is detected. phone: force the phone UI on for this client. off: never activate on this client.
TAPTABLE.WarnPauseToggle: TapTable: could not toggle the pause state (see console).
TAPTABLE.ScenesGmOnly: Only a GM can browse scenes here.
TAPTABLE.ScenesHint: Tapping changes which scene YOU view on this device only — it does not move players or activate the scene.
TAPTABLE.ScenesEmpty: No scenes exist in this world yet.
TAPTABLE.ActivateSceneContent:
Activate {name} for all players?

This changes the world's active scene and pulls every connected player to it.
TAPTABLE.WarnSceneGone: TapTable: that scene no longer exists.
TAPTABLE.BoardLiteMode: Lite mode is on, so the game map is turned off on this device. Turn Lite mode off in Settings (and reload) to see the board.
TAPTABLE.BoardNoScene: No scene is currently being viewed, so there is no board to show yet.
TAPTABLE.TokenHudLabel: Open the selected token's HUD (status effects, target)
TAPTABLE.TargetModeOn: Target mode is on — tap to turn off
TAPTABLE.TargetModeOff: Target mode: tap tokens to target them
TAPTABLE.MultiSelectOn: Multi-select is on — tap to turn off
TAPTABLE.MultiSelectOff: Multi-select: tap owned tokens to select several
TAPTABLE.WarnSelectTokenFirst: TapTable: select a token you own first (tap it on the map), then open its HUD.
TAPTABLE.WarnHudUnavailable: TapTable: the token HUD is unavailable here (Lite mode or core API drift).
TAPTABLE.WarnHudOpenFailed: TapTable: could not open the token HUD (see console).
TAPTABLE.WarnTargetModeFailed: TapTable: could not toggle target mode (see console).
TAPTABLE.EndTurnOwnerOnly: Only the current combatant's owner can end the turn
TAPTABLE.CombatEmptyNoCombatants: No combatants yet. The GM adds tokens to the encounter on the map.
TAPTABLE.CombatEmptyNoCombat: No active combat. When the GM starts an encounter it appears here.
TAPTABLE.RollAllLabel: Roll initiative for all combatants that have none
TAPTABLE.WarnNoCanvasFocus: TapTable: the map is off on this device (Lite mode) or no scene is viewed — cannot focus a combatant.
TAPTABLE.WarnCombatantGone: TapTable: that combatant is no longer in the encounter.
TAPTABLE.WarnCombatantNotOnScene: TapTable: that combatant's token is not on the scene you are viewing.
TAPTABLE.WarnFocusFailed: TapTable: could not focus that combatant (see console).
TAPTABLE.WarnNoActorInitiative: TapTable: that combatant has no actor to roll initiative for.
TAPTABLE.WarnRollInitiativeFailed: TapTable: could not roll initiative (see console).
TAPTABLE.PlacementDisabled: Token placement is disabled: the map is off on this device (Lite mode) or no scene is viewed.
TAPTABLE.WarnActorGone: TapTable: that actor no longer exists.
TAPTABLE.WarnNoCanvasPlace: TapTable: the map is off on this device (Lite mode) or no scene is viewed — cannot place a token from here.
TAPTABLE.WarnNoViewCenter: TapTable: could not determine the view center; token not placed.
TAPTABLE.InfoPlacedActor: TapTable: placed {name} at the view center.
TAPTABLE.HomeNoCharacter: No character is assigned to this user. Ask the GM to set one on your player, then reload.
TAPTABLE.WarnFavoriteUnresolved: TapTable: that favorite could not be resolved anymore.
TAPTABLE.MacrosEmpty: No macros on your hotbar yet. Add macros to the hotbar (drag them onto it on desktop, or create them in the Macro Directory) and they will appear here to tap and run.
TAPTABLE.WarnMacroGone: TapTable: that macro is no longer available.
TAPTABLE.WarnMacroNotRunnable: TapTable: that macro cannot be run from here (core API drift?).
TAPTABLE.WarnMacroRunFailed: TapTable: could not run that macro (see console).
TAPTABLE.ModsEmpty: No modules have added shortcuts here yet. Modules can register entries via the taptable registerTab API (section: "modules") — see the module README.
TAPTABLE.LiteModeOnContent: Lite mode turns the game map (canvas) off on this device to save memory and battery. Chat, sheets and combat keep working. Reload now?
TAPTABLE.LiteModeOffContent: Turn the game map back on for this device and reload?
TAPTABLE.PerfProfileConsented: Consent recorded on this device — tapping applies without re-asking. Resolution scaling fully applies after the next reload.
TAPTABLE.PerfProfileAsk: Asks once, then sets LOW performance mode, 30 FPS cap, mipmaps on, resolution scaling off — this device only.
TAPTABLE.PerfProfileContent:
Apply the battery-saver graphics profile on this device only? It sets:

  • Performance mode: Low
  • Framerate cap: 30 FPS
  • Mipmap antialiasing: on
  • Resolution scaling: off

Your consent is remembered on this device and you will not be asked again.
TAPTABLE.FreeMemoryContent: This enables Lite mode (map off, this device only) and reloads to release map memory. Chat, sheets and combat keep working.
TAPTABLE.ConfigHint: GM tools: open Foundry and module configuration on this device — for example to paste API keys.
TAPTABLE.ConfigEmpty: No configuration menus are available to open here.
TAPTABLE.WarnSettingsOpenFailed: TapTable: could not open the settings configuration (see console).
TAPTABLE.WarnMenuGone: TapTable: that settings menu is no longer available.
TAPTABLE.WarnMenuOpenFailed: TapTable: could not open that settings menu (see console).
TAPTABLE.RollerNoCharacter: No character is assigned to this user, so ability, save and skill quick rolls are unavailable — the manual dice builder above still works. Ask the GM to assign a character to your player, then reload.
TAPTABLE.RollerSelectActor: Select an actor above to roll with their modifiers — the manual dice builder works without one.
TAPTABLE.RollerNoRollables: No quick rolls are available for {name} on this game system — the manual dice builder above still works.
TAPTABLE.WarnNoRollActor: TapTable: no actor to roll for.
TAPTABLE.CompendiumEmpty: No visible compendiums have entries in this category.
TAPTABLE.WarnOwnOnly: TapTable: you can only add items to a character you own.
TAPTABLE.WarnNoCharacterToAdd: TapTable: no character to add items to.
TAPTABLE.WarnEntryUnresolved: TapTable: "{name}" could not be resolved from its compendium.
TAPTABLE.WarnFavoriteNotUsable: TapTable: "{name}" cannot be activated from here (dnd5e API drift?).
TAPTABLE.WarnInitiativeUnavailable: TapTable: initiative rolling is unavailable for this actor (system API drift?).
